goal: Close all outstanding v3 research branches, run a weak-window repair specialist program on the immutable base, and produce a final v4 verdict before any medium-friction work is unlocked.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the baseline snapshot.
Every research branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted or rejected); no half-open branches allowed.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must not be revived.
Medium-friction wave (B1, B2) is locked unless all five unlock conditions are simultaneously satisfied.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair in a single research cycle.

slices.title: Решение по medium-friction wave (unlock gate)
slices.hypothesis: Decide whether to unlock the medium-friction wave (B1 cross-symbol leadership, B2 model-backed IV-routing) or keep it locked.
slices.objective: Decide whether to unlock the medium-friction wave (B1 cross-symbol leadership, B2 model-backed IV-routing) or keep it locked.
success_criteria: A clear lock/unlock decision is recorded. If unlocked, B1 and B2 each have an initial assessment.
evidence_requirements: A clear lock/unlock decision is recorded. If unlocked, B1 and B2 each have an initial assessment.

slices.title: Финальный отчет по v4
slices.hypothesis: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing all v4 research outcomes, terminal decisions, and recommendations for next steps.
slices.objective: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing all v4 research outcomes, terminal decisions, and recommendations for next steps.
success_criteria: A standalone v4 final report exists with all stage outcomes, terminal decisions, and next-step recommendations.
evidence_requirements: A standalone v4 final report exists with all stage outcomes, terminal decisions, and next-step recommendations.
